overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a neon-drenched futuristic metropolis. The character traverses from a covered underpass beneath an overpass, through bustling commercial streets lined with holographic advertisements, and into narrower alleyways before ascending stairs to a building entrance. The scene is characterized by vibrant neon lighting, towering skyscrapers, and wet reflective streets.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a covered walkway beneath a concrete overpass, passing a food vendor on the right

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind food stall with umbrella, facing the walkway

entered.detail: massive concrete bridge structure overhead with support beams
small food cart with umbrella and neon lighting underneath the overpass
illuminated red signage for electronics store mounted on building facade
thick concrete columns supporting the overpass structure

segments.scene_description: The segment opens beneath a massive concrete overpass in a covered pedestrian walkway. A food vendor stall with a large umbrella occupies the center-right area, illuminated by artificial light. The concrete support pillars line the left side as the character walks forward toward the distant opening where neon-lit skyscrapers are visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional covered walkway leading to open intersection

events.description: exits the covered walkway into the open urban intersection with full sky visibility

agents.ego_description: continuing along the covered sidewalk, approaching the open intersection with increasing ambient light from neon signs ahead

notable_agents.action: person in red pants walking ahead on the sidewalk, moving away from camera

entered.detail: metal and concrete benches lined against the building wall
wide open area where multiple streets meet, visible at the end of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character progresses along the covered walkway beneath the Fuyutsuki Electronics signage. Street benches line the left wall. As the character approaches the end of the covered area, the scene opens up to reveal a brightly lit intersection with towering skyscrapers visible in the distance, marking the transition from enclosed to open urban space.

scene_state.functional_zone: major urban intersection with holographic advertising towers

events.description: camera pans upward to look at the towering skyscrapers and holographic billboards overhead
crossing the street at the intersection, moving from sidewalk to crosswalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection while looking up at the massive holographic advertisements on surrounding skyscrapers, then continuing along the street

notable_agents.action: futuristic car driving through the intersection, passing from left to right

entered.detail: massive futuristic towers rising hundreds of stories with illuminated windows
giant floating digital advertisements and brand logos projected on building facades
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on wet asphalt
purple neon signage for PieZ restaurant on building facade
stairs leading down to underground metro station with illuminated entrance

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a vast open intersection surrounded by colossal skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements. The camera pans upward to emphasize the scale of the towers before the character crosses the wet asphalt street. The PieZ restaurant sign and a metro entrance become visible on the right as the character navigates through moderate pedestrian traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with restaurants and markets

events.description: turns right into a narrower street away from the main intersection

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past various storefronts including a market and restaurant, navigating around street barriers

entered.detail: bright teal and pink neon sign for Origami Market with Japanese characters
orange and white metal barricades lining the edge of the street
intense red neon signage illuminating the building facade and sidewalk
opening to a narrower passage between buildings with different lighting

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a commercial sidewalk lined with orange street barriers. The Origami Market with its distinctive teal neon signage appears on the left, while the PieZ sign remains visible on the right. The character passes various storefronts with glowing signs before turning into a narrower street characterized by intense red neon lighting, transitioning from the wide main thoroughfare to a more intimate alleyway.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley leading to building entrance with stairs

events.description: begins ascending concrete stairs toward the building entrance

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow alley past a vendor stall, then ascending a flight of concrete stairs to reach an upper level building entrance

notable_agents.action: vendor standing at small stall on the right side of the alley

entered.detail: tight walls of adjacent buildings creating a narrow passage with red ambient lighting
small street vendor setup with awning and goods displayed
modern building with distinctive purple neon accent lighting on vertical structural elements
wide concrete staircase leading up to an elevated entrance platform
glass and metal entranceway with illuminated canopy at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow alleyway bathed in red neon light from signage on the left wall. A vendor stall occupies the right side of the passage. Ahead, a modern building with striking purple neon vertical lighting comes into view. The character approaches and ascends a wide concrete staircase leading to an elevated entrance platform, reaching the top where the building entrance with its illuminated canopy awaits.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered concrete underpass into the sprawling, neon-lit heart of a futuristic metropolis. It begins within a covered pedestrian walkway beneath a massive overpass, passing a lit food stall and concrete pillars as the camera moves toward a distant glow. As the character progresses past Fuyutsuki Electronics signage and street benches, the enclosed space opens abruptly into a vast intersection dominated by colossal skyscrapers and shimmering holographic advertisements. The scene then shifts across wet asphalt and past the teal neon of Origami Market and a PieZ restaurant, before turning away from the wide thoroughfare into a narrow alleyway bathed in intense red light. Finally, the camera passes a small vendor stall and approaches a building with purple vertical lighting, ascending a wide concrete staircase to reach an illuminated elevated entrance.
